name: Carrots (California Orange Style)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Carrots, peeled and sliced 1/4 inch
1 Orange sections, peeled and cut into bite-size pieces
1 tbsp Green onion, minced, optional Butter Buds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook carrots, covered in salted water until crisp-tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain the carrots.
3. Add orange peel, orange sections, and green onions to the pan.
4. Sprinkle with Butter Buds.
5. Heat through.
6. Serve immediately.
